content.text: I'll explore the codebase to understand the current implementation details before designing the plan.
Now let me read the remaining reference files to understand the full pattern.
Now let me read the two profile stories section components and the reference ProfilePostCards pattern.
Now let me look at the `getStoriesController` to see how the reference pagination controller passes query params down to the service.
I now have a complete understanding of every layer. Let me also quickly verify the `react-intersection-observer` dependency is already in the project (used by ProfilePostCards).
